steps.t: Nahíd's sheep have returned, but need to be herded into their pen. You should <rgb=#00FFFF>whistle</rgb> at Líshu to let her know it is ti…
Líshu is ready to herd the sheep into their pen. You should <rgb=#00FFFF>point</rgb> at the sheep near the pen to instruct Líshu to herd t…
The sheep have all been returned to their pen. You should let Líshu know she has done a good job! If Líshu is missing, you can use Líshu's Horn, on th…
Líshu's job is finished. You should talk to Nahíd.
